name: QMC5883P 3-Axis Magnetometer
description: QST QMC5883P 3-axis magnetic sensor - the chip on NEW GY-271 boards, I2C address 0x2C, LGA-16 3x3x0.9mm. NOT register- or pinout-compatible with QMC5883L (only 6 active pads: SCK/VDD/GND/C1/GND/SDA). C1 4.7uF reservoir capacitor required.
dimensions_source: QST QMC5883P datasheet Rev.C: p.6 LGA-16 3x3x0.9 (pitch 0.5, pad 0.325x0.25); Fig.7 recommended footprint pixel-measured (pads 0.40x0.25, per-side span 1.5 c-c, rows 2.60 c-c, pad outer edges flush with body). Table 5 pinout.
